! Description: Combined yt-defuwuck masterlist in canonical module order
! Version: 2026.3.30
! Last modified: 2026-03-30 02:29
! Expires: 2 weeks (update frequency)
! Homepage: https://github.com/Emm9625/yt-defuwuck

! This file is generated by `make masterlist`
! Edit the module files in filters/ instead of editing this file directly

! --- shorts module (filters/shorts.txt) ---


! Hide Shorts shewves on da homepage
www.youtube.com##ytd-rich-section-renderer:has(a[href^="/shorts/"])

! Hide Shorts shewves on da seawch page
www.youtube.com##ytd-search grid-shelf-view-model:has(a[href^="/shorts/"])
! Hide da Shorts seawch tab
www.youtube.com##yt-chip-cloud-chip-renderer:has(*:has-text(/^Shorts$/i))

! Hide da Shorts button in da sidebaw
www.youtube.com##ytd-guide-entry-renderer:has(yt-formatted-string:has-text(/^Shorts$/i))
! Hide da Shorts button in da mini guide
www.youtube.com##ytd-mini-guide-entry-renderer:has(.title:has-text(/^Shorts$/i))

! Hide Shorts sections except on da histowy page
www.youtube.com##:matches-path(/^(?!\/feed\/history).*$/)ytd-rich-section-renderer:has(#title:has-text(/(^| )Shorts( |$)/i))
www.youtube.com##:matches-path(/^(?!\/feed\/history).*$/)ytd-reel-shelf-renderer:has(.ytd-reel-shelf-renderer:has-text(/(^| )Shorts( |$)/i))

! Hide da Shorts tab on channew pages
www.youtube.com##yt-tab-shape:has-text(/^Shorts$/)

! Hide Shorts wemix shewves in descwiptions and suggestions
www.youtube.com##ytd-reel-shelf-renderer:has(#title:has-text(/(^| )Shorts.?Remix.*$/i))

!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
!!! MOBIWE !!!
!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

! Hide da Shorts button in da bottom nav
m.youtube.com##ytm-pivot-bar-item-renderer:has(.pivot-shorts)

! Hide da Shorts tab on channew pages
m.youtube.com##yt-tab-shape:has-text(/^Shorts$/)

! Hide Shorts sections except on da histowy page
m.youtube.com##:matches-path(/^(?!\/feed\/history).*$/)ytm-rich-section-renderer:has(.yt-core-attributed-string:has-text(/(^| )Shorts( |$)/i))
m.youtube.com##:matches-path(/^(?!\/feed\/history).*$/)ytm-reel-shelf-renderer.item:has(.reel-shelf-title-wrapper .yt-core-attributed-string:has-text(/(^| )Shorts( |$)/i))

! Hide Shorts wemix shewves in descwiptions and bewow da pwayew
m.youtube.com##ytm-reel-shelf-renderer:has(.reel-shelf-title-wrapper .yt-core-attributed-string:has-text(/(^| )Shorts.?Remix.*$/i))

! Hide da Shorts categowy chip on da homepage
m.youtube.com##ytm-chip-cloud-chip-renderer:has(.yt-core-attributed-string:has-text(/^Shorts$/i))

! Hide Shorts sections on da seawch page
m.youtube.com##ytm-reel-shelf-renderer:has(ytm-shorts-lockup-view-model)

! --- comments module (filters/comments.txt) ---

! Hide comments on weguwaw video pages
www.youtube.com###comments > .ytd-comments.style-scope

! Hide comment UI on Shorts pages
www.youtube.com##reel-action-bar-view-model dislike-button-view-model + *

! --- playables module (filters/playables.txt) ---

! Hide Playables shewves on da homepage
www.youtube.com##ytd-rich-section-renderer:has(a[href^="/playables/"])

! Hide Playables shewves on da seawch page
www.youtube.com##ytd-search grid-shelf-view-model:has(a[href^="/playables/"])

! Hide da Playables categowy chip on da mobiwe homepage
m.youtube.com##ytm-chip-cloud-chip-renderer:has(.yt-core-attributed-string:has-text(/^YouTube Playables$/i))

! --- subscriptions module (filters/subscriptions.txt) ---

! Hide da Most welevant shewf on da subscriptions page
www.youtube.com##:matches-path(/^\/feed\/subscriptions$/) ytd-rich-section-renderer:has(#title:has-text(/^Most relevant$/i))
